test.name: Open_Application

kw.name: Open Application
kw.msg: Remote response: status=200 | data={"value":{"capabilities":{"platformName":"Android","deviceName":"emulator-5554","appPackage":"com.samsung.android.oneconnect","appActivity":"com.samsung.android.oneconnect.ui.SCMainActivity","automationName":"UiAutomator2","platform":"LINUX","webStorageEnabled":false,"takesScreenshot":true,"javascriptEnabled":true,"databaseEnabled":false,"networkConnectionEnabled":true,"locationContextEnabled":false,"warnings":{},"desired":{"platformName":"Android","deviceName":"emulator-5554","appPackage":"com.samsung.android.oneconnect","appActivity":"com.samsung.android.oneconnect.ui.SCMainActivity","automationName":"UiAutomator2"},"deviceUDID":"emulator-5554","pixelRatio":"3","statBarHeight":156,"viewportRect":{"left":0,"top":156,"width":1280,"height":2700},"deviceApiLevel":36,"platformVersion":"16","deviceManufacturer":"Google","deviceModel":"sdk_gphone64_x86_64","deviceScreenSize":"1280x2856","deviceScreenDensity":480},"sessionId":"3ebd4c50-d35f-4bc4-8cf4-07632ea7a5cc"}} | headers=HTTPHeaderDict({'X-Powered-By': 'Express', 'Vary': 'X-HTTP-Method-Override', 'Content-Type': 'application/json; charset=utf-8', 'Content-Length': '974', 'ETag': 'W/"3ce-THYI9pYI61EloxLBUoyVVSdY4j0"', 'Date': 'Tue, 26 May 2026 11:27:24 GMT', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Keep-Alive': 'timeout=600'})
kw.doc: Opens a new application to the given Appium server. Capabilities of appium server, Android and iOS, Please check https://appium.io/docs/en/2.19/guides/caps/ | *Option* | *Man.* | *Description* | | remote_url | Yes | Appium server url | | alias | No | alias |

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into the log.

kw.msg: ValueError: Element locator 'id=com.samsung.android.oneconnect:id/cancel' did not match any elements.

Traceback (most recent call last): File "C:\Users\Niral.Shah\PycharmProjects\robotframewrok\.venv\Lib\site-packages\decorator.py", line 235, in fun return caller(func, *(extras + args), **kw) File "C:\Users\Niral.Shah\PycharmProjects\robotframewrok\.venv\Lib\site-packages\AppiumLibrary\keywords\keywordgroup.py", line 20, in _run_on_failure_decorator raise err File "C:\Users\Niral.Shah\PycharmProjects\robotframewrok\.venv\Lib\site-packages\AppiumLibrary\keywords\keywordgroup.py", line 15, in _run_on_failure_decorator return method(*args, **kwargs) File "C:\Users\Niral.Shah\PycharmProjects\robotframewrok\.venv\Lib\site-packages\AppiumLibrary\keywords\_element.py", line 47, in click_element self._element_find(locator, True, True).click() ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ File "C:\Users\Niral.Shah\PycharmProjects\robotframewrok\.venv\Lib\site-packages\AppiumLibrary\keywords\_element.py", line 708, in _element_find raise ValueError("Element locator '" + locator + "' did not match any elements.") ValueError: Element locator 'id=com.samsung.android.oneconnect:id/cancel' did not match any elements.
kw.doc: Clicks the element identified by ``locator``.
kw.status: ValueError: Element locator 'id=com.samsung.android.oneconnect:id/cancel' did not match any elements.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element specified by the ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Clicks the element identified by ``locator``.
